instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-collector` that hides list head and tail pointers and exposes a user-named local function that appends items in O(1). The form returns the collected list.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 NIL) (#:G2 NIL))
            (FLET ((COLLECT (#:G3)
                     (LET ((#:G4 (CONS #:G3 NIL)))
                       (IF #:G1
                           (SETF (CDR #:G2) #:G4
                                 #:G2 #:G4)
                           (SETF #:G1 #:G4
                                 #:G2 #:G4)))))
              (COLLECT 1)
              (COLLECT 2)
              #:G1))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 NIL) (#:G113 NIL))
            (FLET ((COLLECT (#:G114)
                     (LET ((#:G115 (CONS #:G114 NIL)))
                       (IF #:G112
